name: intent
description: Captures WHY each tool call is made: injects the required 'i' field into tool schemas (plus system-prompt and few-shot reinforcement), extracts it from streamed tool calls into the shared cache, and strips it before the harness sees it. Run before keyword_compactor OR compactor — both consume the intent cache.

permissions.name: env.cache_get
permissions.description: Re-read cached intents to re-hydrate prior tool calls in history

permissions.name: env.meta_get
permissions.description: Read fragment buffers and tool-call tracking

permissions.name: env.meta_set
permissions.description: Write fragment buffers and tool-call tracking
